name: workflow-skill-router
description: Runtime-aware Skill routing for Single, Phased, and Managed Goal work in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Route Codex work through the smallest verifiable Skill set.
interface.longDescription: Discovers runtime capabilities, preserves user-selected Skills, reroutes each Phase or Goal Work Item, and reports planned and actual Skill usage.
defaultPrompt: Classify this request as Single, Phased, or Managed Goal work.
When no Skill is named, choose the smallest sufficient set. When a Skill is named, ask before adding support outside that choice.
Declare planned Skill usage before execution and report actual usage at completion.
